target:
# Try a different approach - use CDX to find all partypoker pages from 2004-2006
curl -s --max-time 60 "https://web.archive.org/cdx/search/cdx?url=www.partypoker.com/*&output=text&limit=100&from=20040101&to=20070101&fl=timestamp,original,mimetype,statuscode" 2>&1 | grep -v "404\|redirect\|301\|302" | grep -i "screenshot\|software\|client\|howto\|how_to\|poker_room\|game" | head -30
